title: Guided Prayer
subtitle: A few quiet minutes with God

en.text: Take a quiet moment with Guided Prayer in the Bible App.
en.caption: Guided Prayer

en.text: Let Scripture lead you, one gentle step at a time.
en.caption: One step at a time

en.text: Start praying today. Download the Bible App.
en.caption: Free — download today

en.text: Meet Guided Prayer in the YouVersion Bible App.
en.caption: Guided Prayer

en.text: Wherever you are, God is near — and He's ready to listen.
en.caption: God is near

en.text: Each prayer walks you through Scripture, gently.
en.caption: Led by Scripture

en.text: Pause on a verse, and let it become your prayer.
en.caption: Make it your prayer

en.text: Honor God, bring Him your thoughts, and give thanks.
en.caption: Praise and thanks

en.text: Just a few minutes can steady your whole day.
en.caption: A few quiet minutes

en.text: Make prayer a daily rhythm, wherever you are.
en.caption: A daily rhythm

en.text: It's completely free. Download the Bible App today.
en.caption: Free — download today
